calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-24-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Leslie Schneider.
Appearances:
Vaughn E. Spunaugle, Esq. for Plaintiff Kevin Beights, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations and testimony, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Carlos Ramirez and Angelina Gutierrez.
Matter is under submission.
Counsel to prepare proposed judgment.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2003 Continued To Jan-26-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-02-2003 Continued To Dec-18-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: Matter comes on for prove-up hearing in Dept. 611 on Oct-02-2003. Plaintiff's counsel Vaughn Spunaugle present; no appearance by Plaintiff Kevin Beights. Plaintiff's counsel requests a continuance of the hearing to Dec. 18, 2003. The Court grants the request, and the hearing of the matter is continued to 09:00 a.m. on December 18, 2003 in Department 218. Judge: Diane Wick; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Candace Yount (D. 611)
